title: cerasus avium var. lutea
intro: Cerasus avium var. lutea, also known as the yellow cherry, is a plant species within the Prunus genus, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible fruits. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the digestive system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Cerasus avium var. lutea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and its fruits can be consumed fresh or used in jams and preserves.
